releaseNotes:
v1.3.0 — Keyboard Upgrade

• Long-press any key to type symbol shortcuts instantly
• Alternative characters now visible on each key
• Swipe space bar left/right to switch languages (no more globe key)
• Space bar shows current language name with ‹ › arrows
• Smaller, cleaner key text
• Fixed key preview animation dragging across keys
• 8 keyboard languages supported with full long-press alternatives
